mapper.insert:
insert into sys_user_role(user_id, role_id, create_time, update_time, deleted) values
(#{item.userId}, #{item.roleId}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.deleted})
mapper.update: update sys_user_role set deleted = 1, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and deleted = 0
update sys_user_role set deleted = 1, update_time = now() where role_id = #{roleId} and deleted = 0
